name: Slicker
description: AI-driven payment recovery engine using personalized retry schedules and multi-gateway routing.

seo.title: Slicker — Payments Orchestration
seo.meta_description: Slicker: AI-driven payment recovery engine using personalized retry schedules and multi-gateway routing.

when_to_use: Recovering failed subscription payments with smart retry logic
Multi-gateway routing to reduce involuntary churn
Personalized retry schedules based on decline reason codes

pros: AI retry scheduling personalized per customer
Focused product with clear ROI story
cons: Narrow scope — recovery and retry only
Smaller team and shorter track record
review.verdict: Solid decline-recovery tool with a sharper AI angle; compare carefully against FlexPay and Butter before committing.
review.best_for: Subscription and recurring merchants with measurable involuntary churn from declines.
review.not_for: One-time commerce teams or merchants with minimal recurring revenue exposure.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact sales — no explicit peak-lock evidence
